problem id: c33ad31a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  11010110 -> 00000010
  10100000 -> 00000000
  01110111 -> 00000011
  01010110 -> 00000010
  10111111 -> 00000101
  01011000 -> 00000000
  01000111 -> 00000010
  00011000 -> 00000000

query: 01000001
predicted answer: 00000000
